scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix ui install && npm --prefix lambdas install && npm --prefix tests install
scripts.test: npm --prefix ui run test && npm --prefix lambdas run test
scripts.test:playwright: BASE_URL=$(npm run local:terraform -- output -raw ui_url) API_BASE_URL=$(npm run local:terraform -- output -raw order_result_endpoint) npm --prefix tests run test
scripts.local:start: npm run local:backend:start && npm run local:terraform:init && npm run local:deploy && npm run local:frontend:start
scripts.local:stop: npm run local:terraform:destroy && COMPOSE_PROFILES=* npm run local:compose:down
scripts.local:restart: npm run local:stop && npm run local:start
scripts.local:deploy: npm run build:lambdas && npm run package:lambdas && npm run local:terraform:apply
scripts.local:backend:start: COMPOSE_PROFILES=backend npm run local:compose:up && npm run local:service:db:migrate
scripts.local:frontend:start: npm run local:terraform:env && COMPOSE_PROFILES=frontend npm run local:compose:up
scripts.local:service:db:migrate: npm run local:compose -- --profile backend up --build db-migrate
